HomePage.title: A more refined presence for menu, table and shared bill.
HomePage.description: Sazono brings together the digital menu, QR ordering, floor work and payments around the same table, with a calm, warm interface that stays easy to read in light or dark mode.
HomePage.stats_hybrid: guest and waiter at the same table
HomePage.preview_description: Guests can order by scanning the QR code while the waiter adds rounds and the kitchen receives separate tickets by station.
HomePage.preview_client_desc: Scan the QR code, build the order and pay without downloading an app.
HomePage.preview_hall_desc: The waiter adds new rounds and stays in control of closing the table.
HomePage.pillar_menu_desc: Photos, languages, availability and categories you edit yourself, without relying on technical support.
HomePage.pillar_qr_desc: Guests scan the table's QR code, build their order and, if the restaurant chooses so, pay before the kitchen starts preparing.
HomePage.pillar_bill_desc: The table keeps a single bill even when several guests pay at different times.
HomePage.journey_title: Sazono thinks of the table as a cycle, not as isolated sales.
HomePage.journey_description: Everything starts when the table is opened. Orders can arrive from the QR code or from the waiter. The kitchen works by station. The bill stays a single one until the restaurant decides to close it.
HomePage.journey_1: The restaurant publishes its own menu for each branch.
HomePage.journey_2: The table opens when the QR code is scanned or when the waiter opens it.
HomePage.journey_3: Orders reach kitchen and bar according to each dish's station.
HomePage.journey_4: The bill can be paid in full or in parts without creating parallel bills.
HomePage.surfaces_description: Each screen solves a different problem. Guests need clarity. The team needs speed. Cashier and kitchen need control.
HomePage.surface_qr_desc: A menu designed for phones, payment before preparation and an easy way to split the bill.
HomePage.surface_staff_desc: Active table, fast rounds and manual closing once the balance reaches zero.
HomePage.surface_kitchen_desc: Separate tickets per station without breaking the guest experience.
HomePage.surface_cashier_desc: Pending balances, walkouts and a clear record of every payment.
HomePage.foundation_title: A visual foundation ready to grow: QR menu, team tools and menu builder.
HomePage.foundation_description: Colors, dark mode and typography are already settled. From here, the QR experience and the team tools can grow without redoing the design.
HomePage.foundation_item_1: Buttons and components accessible to everyone
HomePage.foundation_item_2: Information always up to date on every screen
HomePage.foundation_item_3: Fast, smooth response at all times
HomePage.foundation_item_4: Forms that check the data before sending it

ContactSection.title: Book a demo or tell us what you need
ContactSection.description: Our team walks you through Sazono live and answers your questions, no strings attached.
ContactSection.formIntentDemo: I want to book a demo
ContactSection.formMessagePlaceholder: How many branches you have, what you'd like to try...
ContactSection.successTitle: Got it! We received your message.
ContactSection.successDescription: We'll reach out to your email soon.
ContactSection.errorToast: We couldn't send your message. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.

FindRestaurantScreen.title: Find your restaurant
FindRestaurantScreen.description: Search your restaurant's name to go to its sign-in screen.
FindRestaurantScreen.emptyDescription: Check the spelling, or contact us and we'll help you sign in.
FindRestaurantScreen.searchError: We couldn't search for your restaurant. Please try again.

AdminLeads.pageDescription: People and restaurants that requested contact or a demo from the landing page.
AdminLeads.loadError: We couldn't load the leads. Try again.

QrPage.noTable_title: Scan the QR code on your table
QrPage.noTable_description: To see the menu and order from your phone, scan the QR code sitting on your table. If you can't find it, ask someone from the team for a hand.
QrPage.error_description: This code may no longer be active, or this place hasn't finished its menu yet. Let someone from the team know so they can help you.
QrPage.header_welcome: Hi there! Order from your phone and we'll bring it to your table.
QrPage.banner_payOrder_title: You have an order to pay
QrPage.banner_pendingBill_title: You have {amount} pending on your bill
QrPage.bill_sheet_description: Here's everything you've ordered at this table.
QrPage.menu_empty_title: The menu is taking a break
QrPage.menu_empty_description: This place is still getting its dishes ready. Check back in a little while.
QrPage.cart_empty: Your order is empty. Treat yourself to something tasty from the menu!
QrPage.cart_notesPlaceholder: For example: no onion, peanut allergy...
QrPage.cart_submitError: We couldn't send your order. Please try again in a moment.
QrPage.pay_description: Pay now and the kitchen will get started on your order.
QrPage.pay_tipLabel: Would you like to leave a tip?
QrPage.pay_retryDescription: The previous attempt didn't go through. Check the details and try again whenever you're ready.
QrPage.pay_successToast: Payment received! Your order is on its way.
QrPage.pay_errorToast: The payment didn't go through. Please try again.
QrPage.orderHint_AWAITING_PAYMENT: Just the payment left and we'll get started.
QrPage.orderHint_PAYMENT_FAILED: The payment didn't go through. You can try again whenever you like.
QrPage.orderHint_CONFIRMED: Got it! Your order is on its way to the kitchen.
QrPage.orderHint_ROUTED: Your order has reached the kitchen.
QrPage.orderHint_IN_PREPARATION: Your order is in the kitchen. It smells great already!
QrPage.orderHint_PARTIALLY_READY: Part of your order is ready and on its way.
QrPage.orderHint_READY: Ready to serve! We'll bring it right over.
QrPage.orderHint_CANCELLED: This order was cancelled. If that was a mistake, let us know.

SplitPayment.noToken_description: Ask whoever organized the bill to share your payment link with you.
SplitPayment.error_title: We couldn't find your share of the bill
SplitPayment.error_description: This link may no longer be active. Let someone from the restaurant team know.
SplitPayment.paid_description: Thanks. There's nothing pending on your end.
SplitPayment.title: {name}'s share
SplitPayment.description: Check the amount and pay your share of the bill whenever you're ready.
SplitPayment.tipLabel: Would you like to leave a tip?
SplitPayment.payErrorToast: The payment didn't go through. Please try again.

StaffPage.title: The floor workspace
StaffPage.description: From here the team runs the floor: create tables, see the status of each one per branch, open tables to start serving and pick up the ones already occupied.

MenuStudioPage.title: Menu builder per branch
MenuStudioPage.description: Here the branch admin builds the menu step by step: preparation stations (kitchen, bar, desserts), draft versions, categories, priced products and the publishing of the menu guests will see.

MenuStudio.requireLoginTitle: First sign in with your restaurant account
MenuStudio.requireLoginDescription: The menu builder uses the same session as the admin panel. Sign in first with your restaurant account and then come back here.
MenuStudio.wrongProfileTitle: Your current account is not a restaurant account
MenuStudio.wrongProfileDescription: The menu builder is only available for restaurant accounts. Switch accounts from the admin panel.
MenuStudio.noAdminRoleTitle: You need to be a branch Admin
MenuStudio.noAdminRoleDescription: Only a branch Admin can manage stations, menu versions and publishing. Your account doesn't have that role in any branch yet.
MenuStudio.workspaceTitle: The living menu of the branch
MenuStudio.workspaceDescription: The whole process lives here: first the preparation stations, then a draft version, then categories and products, and finally the publishing that makes the menu ready for your guests and your team.
MenuStudio.branchHint: You can only edit the menu of branches where you are an Admin.
MenuStudio.stationsDescription: Every dish or drink on the menu is prepared at a station. Tickets arrive grouped by station.
MenuStudio.stationsEmpty: No stations exist in this branch yet. Create at least one before adding products.
MenuStudio.stationsErrorDescription: Check that you are signed in and have selected the right branch, then try again.
MenuStudio.stationCreateHint: The type defines which preparation area receives the tickets.
MenuStudio.stationCreateError: We couldn't create the station. Please try again.
MenuStudio.versionsDescription: A published menu can't be edited. Changes always happen on a new draft version, which you publish when it's ready.
MenuStudio.versionsEmpty: This branch has no menu versions yet. Create the first draft version.
MenuStudio.versionsErrorTitle: We couldn't load the menu versions
MenuStudio.versionsErrorDescription: Check that you are signed in and have selected the right branch, then try again.
MenuStudio.versionMeta: Version {version} · {categories, plural, one {# category} other {# categories}} · {items, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}
MenuStudio.versionCreateHint: The new version starts empty, as a draft, so you can edit it at your own pace.
MenuStudio.versionCreateError: We couldn't create the menu version. Please try again.
MenuStudio.editorEmpty: Select or create a menu version to start editing it.
MenuStudio.editorDraftDescription: This version is a draft: add categories, load products with their price and publish when it's ready.
MenuStudio.editorReadonlyDescription: This version can no longer be edited. To make changes, create a new draft version.
MenuStudio.publishBlockedHint: To publish you need at least one active category with products.
MenuStudio.publishSuccess: Menu {name} is now published and is the active menu.
MenuStudio.publishError: We couldn't publish the menu. Please try again.
MenuStudio.categoriesEmpty: This menu has no categories yet. Start by creating the first one, for example Mains or Cocktails.
MenuStudio.categoryError: We couldn't add the category. Please try again.
MenuStudio.categoryNoItems: No products yet. Add the first one so this category counts towards publishing.
MenuStudio.categoryUpdateError: We couldn't update the category. Please try again.
MenuStudio.categoryReorderError: We couldn't save the new category order. Please try again.
MenuStudio.itemReorderError: We couldn't save the new product order. Please try again.
MenuStudio.itemImageHint: JPEG, PNG or WEBP, up to 5MB.
MenuStudio.itemImageUploadError: We couldn't upload the image. Please try again.
MenuStudio.itemImageRemoveError: We couldn't remove the image. Please try again.
MenuStudio.categoryTranslationError: We couldn't save the category translation. Please try again.
MenuStudio.itemTranslationError: We couldn't save the product translation. Please try again.
MenuStudio.translationHint: Optional. Shown to guests browsing the menu in this language.
MenuStudio.itemPriceHint: Final price with tax included, no decimals.
MenuStudio.itemStationMissing: First create an active station in this branch.
MenuStudio.itemError: We couldn't add the product. Please try again.
MenuStudio.itemUpdateError: We couldn't update the product. Please try again.

FloorConsole.requireLoginTitle: First sign in with your restaurant account
FloorConsole.requireLoginDescription: The floor uses the same session as the admin panel. Sign in first with your restaurant account and then come back here.
FloorConsole.wrongProfileTitle: Your current account is not a restaurant account
FloorConsole.wrongProfileDescription: The floor is only available for restaurant accounts. Switch accounts from the admin panel.
FloorConsole.noRolesTitle: You don't have a role assigned yet
FloorConsole.noRolesDescription: To work with tables, an admin first needs to assign you a role in at least one branch.
FloorConsole.refreshDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again in a few seconds.
FloorConsole.workspaceTitle: Your branch's floor, in real time
FloorConsole.workspaceDescription: From here the team creates the floor tables, opens a table to start serving and picks up the ones already occupied.
FloorConsole.branchHint: You will only see the tables of the selected branch.
FloorConsole.sourceHint: The available options depend on your role in the branch.
FloorConsole.readForbiddenTitle: Your role doesn't allow working on the floor
FloorConsole.readForbiddenDescription: To view tables or pick them up you need to be an Admin, Supervisor, Waiter or Cashier in the selected branch.
FloorConsole.createDescription: The table is created with its own QR code and is ready to welcome guests.
FloorConsole.createForbidden: Only an Admin or a Supervisor can create tables in this branch.
FloorConsole.capacityHint: Indicate how many people fit at the table, as a reference.
FloorConsole.createError: We couldn't create the table. Please try again.
FloorConsole.sessionTitle: What's happening at the selected table
FloorConsole.sessionDescription: When a table is already occupied, here you can see the details of its service and continue serving right where it left off.
FloorConsole.sessionError: We couldn't load the table details. Please try again.
FloorConsole.sessionEmpty: Select an occupied table to see its service. If a table is free, open it first from the list below.
FloorConsole.addOrderDescription: Search the published menu and add items. It's charged straight to the table's bill.
FloorConsole.addOrderMenuEmpty: This branch doesn't have a published menu yet.
FloorConsole.addOrderSearchEmpty: We couldn't find any products with that name.
FloorConsole.addOrderMenuError: We couldn't load the menu. Please try again.
FloorConsole.addOrderCartEmpty: Add items to build the order.
FloorConsole.addOrderError: We couldn't send the order. Please try again.
FloorConsole.tablesDescription: All the tables in the branch, with their status, capacity, QR code and active service when there is one.
FloorConsole.tablesErrorDescription: Check that you are signed in and have selected the right branch, then try again.
FloorConsole.tablesEmpty: There are no tables in this branch yet. The natural next step is to create the first one.
FloorConsole.openError: We couldn't open the table. Please try again.
FloorConsole.qrTitle: QR code ready to print or test
FloorConsole.qrDescription: Each table has its own QR code. When guests scan it, they land directly on this table. The public menu doesn't show yet, but the entrance is ready.
FloorConsole.qrHelper: This link is the guest's entrance when scanning the QR code. Very soon it will open the branch's published menu.
FloorConsole.qrEmpty: Select a table to generate its QR code.
FloorConsole.billingTitle: The table's bill and how to close it
FloorConsole.billingDescription: The bill opens together with the table. You can only close the table once the bill is fully paid.
FloorConsole.billingEmpty: Select an occupied table to see its bill and close it if it's already paid.
FloorConsole.billingErrorTitle: We couldn't load the current bill
FloorConsole.billingErrorDescription: Check the table's status or try again.
FloorConsole.closeReasonPlaceholder: Bill manually closed by the cashier.
FloorConsole.closeReasonDefault: Bill manually closed from the floor.
FloorConsole.closeHintAllowed: The remaining balance is zero: you can close the table now.
FloorConsole.closeHintBlocked: The table can't be closed while the bill still has a remaining balance.
FloorConsole.closeError: We couldn't close the table. Check that the bill is fully paid and try again.
FloorConsole.abandonDescription: Use this when the customer left without paying, or there's a debt that won't be collected. The table becomes free even if a balance remains.
FloorConsole.abandonReasonPlaceholder: E.g.: customer left without paying, reported by the waiter.
FloorConsole.abandonError: We couldn't process the abandonment. Please try again.
FloorConsole.splitDescription: Share the pending balance among guests. Each one gets a link to pay their part from their phone.
FloorConsole.splitActiveHint: There's already an active split for this bill.
FloorConsole.splitBalanced: The parts add up to the pending total.
FloorConsole.splitUnbalanced: {amount} still needs to be assigned to match the total.
FloorConsole.splitCreateError: We couldn't split the bill. Check that the parts add up to the exact total.

KitchenBoard.pageDescription: The tickets coming from each order, grouped by status. Advance each one as it gets prepared.
KitchenBoard.noRolesDescription: You don't have a role assigned in any branch yet. Ask an admin to assign you one to see tickets.
KitchenBoard.readForbiddenDescription: To see kitchen tickets you need to be Admin, Supervisor, Kitchen or Bar in the selected branch.
KitchenBoard.updateError: We couldn't update the ticket. Please try again.

AdminPage.title: Your restaurant's first steps
AdminPage.description: From here you can sign in, create your restaurant, open the first branch and add your team.

PlatformLoginScreen.title: Sazono administration
PlatformLoginScreen.subtitle: Sign in with your Sazono admin account.

RestaurantLoginScreen.subtitle: Sign in with your account for this restaurant.
RestaurantLoginScreen.notFoundDescription: Check the link you were given. If the problem continues, contact Sazono.

StaffLoginRequired.title: You need your restaurant's link
StaffLoginRequired.description: This screen is only for signed-in staff. Sign in from the login link your restaurant shared with you.

AdminBootstrap.title: Create a restaurant and its first admin account
AdminBootstrap.name: Display name
AdminBootstrap.branchQuotaHint: How many branches this restaurant can create, per what was agreed during onboarding.
AdminBootstrap.passwordHint: With this account, that person will later sign in as part of the restaurant's team.
AdminBootstrap.expectedDescription: The restaurant is created together with its first admin account.
AdminBootstrap.timezoneHint: We'll use this time zone for the restaurant's schedules and reports.

AdminBranch.title: Create your restaurant's first branch
AdminBranch.description: If you don't have any branch yet, this step creates the first one and automatically makes you its Admin.
AdminBranch.name: Branch name
AdminBranch.paymentHint: We recommend payment before preparation: guests pay at the moment they place their order.
AdminBranch.after2: 2. The branch is ready with its initial settings.
AdminBranch.after3: 3. Your account becomes the branch Admin.
AdminBranch.after4: 4. You can now add your team.
AdminBranch.pageDescription: Create new branches and see which ones you can manage.
AdminBranch.welcomeDescription: To get started, create your first branch. Then you can add tables, build your menu, and invite your team.

paymentModes.prepaid_order: Guests pay when they place their order
paymentModes.postpaid_bill: Guests pay at the end, when they ask for the bill

AdminStaff.title: Add your team per branch
AdminStaff.description: Add the people on your team and assign them a role in each branch. If the email already has a Sazono account, that person keeps their usual password.
AdminStaff.passwordHint: If the email already has a Sazono account, this field is optional: the person will keep using their current password.
AdminStaff.currentDescription: The list updates in real time.
AdminStaff.formDescription: Create their account and assign them a branch and a role.
AdminStaff.createSuccess: {name} is now part of the team.

AdminStaff.listError: We couldn't load the team. Refresh the page to try again.
AdminStaff.emptyList: No one is on the team yet. Invite the first person with the form.
AdminStaff.selfStatusHint: You can't deactivate your own account.
AdminStaff.rolesHint: You can only change roles for the branches you manage.
AdminStaff.duplicateRole: That person already has that role at that branch.
AdminStaff.updateError: We couldn't save the changes. Please try again.

AdminConsole.forbiddenDescription: This panel is for setting up the restaurant and managing the team. Your account has access to operate, but it isn't an Admin of any branch.

AdminShell.accessDeniedDescription: Your account doesn't have permission to view this page. If you think this is a mistake, talk to your restaurant's administrator.

PlatformOverview.title: Platform overview
PlatformOverview.description: A quick look at the restaurants using Sazono and the payments they process.
PlatformOverview.monthlyDescription: Total processed by restaurants over the last 12 months.
PlatformOverview.topDescription: The five restaurants that processed the most payments.

RestaurantOverview.operationalDescription: This dashboard is for administrators. With your role you can work the floor, kitchen, or register from the tables view.
